title: Pain au Chocolat
description: Buttery laminated dough folded around two batons of dark Valrhona chocolate.

title: Croissant aux Amandes
description: A day-baked croissant brushed with almond syrup, filled with frangipane, and dusted with sugar.

title: Tarte aux Fraises
description: Crisp sweet pastry shell, vanilla bean custard, and a crown of fresh strawberries.

title: Baguette Tradition
description: Long-fermented crusty baguette with an open, chewy crumb and a deep golden crust.

title: Eclair au Cafe
description: Choux pastry piped with coffee pastry cream and finished in a glossy espresso glaze.
